compiled_state.title: As a developer, I want CLAUDE.md and operational docs updated with kudos system operational notes and empty-snapshot behavior
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
As a developer, I need CLAUDE.md updated with kudos system operational notes so that contributors can reason about system behavior.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- CLAUDE.md updated (task description names CLAUDE.md for rule 18 authorization): adds scenario note "kudos T1/T2: empty snapshot disables triggers on clean worktrees — expected behavior; T4 does not require snapshot test data"
- CLAUDE.md includes: kudos.snapshot_enabled config key; brief kudos architecture note (.kudos/ledger.jsonl, .kudos/test-gate-snapshot.json, gitignored)
- Task descriptions explicitly name CLAUDE.md and any other safeguard files targeted

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] CLAUDE.md is a safeguard file (rule 18); task description must explicitly name CLAUDE.md
- [Sequence] Depends on N (transitive) and O — document actual behavior after all stories land
